backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor serving as the backend entry point for the ICP canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting implemented features including expanded CORS proxy fallback chain, TikTok-specific iframe handling, and per-tab retry/open-in-new-window mechanisms with associated file paths and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source files to one-line summaries describing each component's purpose and recent changes.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML shell for the Vite/React app, loading external scripts for Puter.js AI, CodeMirror editor, and Google Custom Search Engine.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component managing page navigation, tab state via useTabs, and a panic overlay mode triggered by button or keyboard shortcut.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/CodeE: Code editor sub-tab using CodeMirror with support for HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Python, featuring a live iframe preview and localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Prese: Presentation builder sub-tab with slide list management, per-slide title/body/color editing, and a fullscreen keyboard-navigable presentation mode.
frontend/src/components/codeeditor/Websi: A drag-and-drop style website builder tab that lets users add, edit, reorder, and preview HTML components (header, text, image, button) with persistent localStorage state.
frontend/src/components/common/LoadingSp: A simple animated CSS spinner component with configurable size (sm/md/lg) and an optional text label.
frontend/src/components/common/ProxyInfo: An expandable info panel that displays proxy configuration details (CORS routes, etc.) with collapsible sections, rendered as an overlay below the header.
frontend/src/components/layout/Header.ts: The top application header displaying the Cheetah logo, branding, a SECURE status badge, and a panic button with keyboard shortcut support.
frontend/src/components/layout/Navigatio: A vertical sidebar navigation component with links to Home, Games, AI, Code, and Quick Open pages, plus keyboard shortcut hints at the bottom.
frontend/src/components/tabs/TabBar.tsx: A horizontal browser-style tab bar that renders open tabs with close buttons and a new-tab button, supporting active tab highlighting.
Renders the content area for a single browser tab, showing an iframe for proxied URLs, a welcome screen for empty tabs, or an error state with retry/open-in-new-window options.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalStorage.ts: Generic React hook that synchronizes a state value with localStorage, supporting functional updates and gracefully handling JSON parse/stringify errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder module with no exports, indicating no backend queries are needed for this frontend-only app.
frontend/src/hooks/useTabs.ts: Manages browser-like tab state (open, close, navigate, proxy fallback chain) persisted to localStorage, with utilities for URL normalization and cycling through multiple CORS proxy strategies including a TikTok embed fallback.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining an always-dark amethyst/violet theme using OKLCH CSS variables, Tailwind base layers, glassmorphism utility classes, custom scrollbar styles, and animated gradient backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AIAssistant.tsx: AI homework assistant page that sends subject-tagged questions to the Puter.js AI API, renders markdown-formatted answers, and persists a history of up to 20 Q&A pairs in localStorage.
frontend/src/pages/CodeEditorPage.tsx: Page component with three sub-tabs (Code Editor, Presentation Builder, Website Builder) rendered via a styled tab bar that switches between the corresponding child components.
frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx: Renders a grid of educational/unblocked game site cards (Math Playground, Scratch, Khan Academy, etc.) with icons and colors, each opening the site URL via the proxy when clicked.
frontend/src/pages/HomeSearch.tsx: Implements the main browser view with an address bar (back/forward/refresh controls), an embedded iframe for proxied page content, and proxy status/error UI including retry and open-in-new-window options.
frontend/src/pages/QuickOpen.tsx: Displays a grid of large quick-access cards for popular sites (TikTok, YouTube, Wikipedia, Disney+, ChatGPT, Google Gemini) that open in the proxy with one click.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with custom amethyst/violet/magenta color palettes, JetBrains Mono and Rajdhani fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the current project state (version 11) for Cheetah 1.0, documenting architectural decisions, existing features, known issues, and high-level app summary for build planning continuity.
